body:
I reviewed this design with @simonbyrne.

Basically, this PR sets up a way for users to "restart" regression tests by updating a reference counter. Here is a sketch of the original plan / design:

```
Work-flow procedure:
 1) We start off with a self reference: print a new reference counter in `print_new_counter` job
 2) (PR author) copy-paste counter into `ref_counter.jl`
 3) Upon next CI run, before performing CI test,
    we check if the counter indicates a self-reference by
    checking if `ref_counter.jl` in the PR matches
    `ref_counter.jl` in the last merged commit (on central).
    If yes, then it's a self reference, if not, then we
    look-up the dataset based on the counter.
```

I'll add proper documentation (by adding to #331) if this works as intended, for now I'd like to try it out.
title: Make regression tests more flexible

body: This PR removes the `NCRegressionTests` and uses the `NCRegressionTests` package. Cleaning things up from #312.
title: Use NCRegressionTests package
